title: Rhyme PVZ
description: PVZ 2  mod, with card advance, ultimate, Crazy Dave
body:
# This is a PVZ mod that inherits the original gameplay of PVZ and adds new mechanics and rules to it.  

## What we have   
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b9e6d65f0953631df9d8793430b85473c4c21c7.png)

Production station  
The Light Extraction Platform can make cards and synthesize solid sunlight. Card upgrade table, which can upgrade your card

## Materials  
Various materials with fine textures are used for various composites.

## Plant cards  
Pea shooter, ice shooter, double shooter and other plants that are easy for new players to get.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9d86c53156e036c85050aefed8ef3934e08265f.png)

## Monsters  
Ordinary zombies, barricade zombies, iron bucket zombies, pole vaulting zombie.

## Crazy Dave  
He will sell cards and materials.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0034537a9695f67026e26db620dfd2fa44523a9.png)

## Armor and tools  
They can drop from zombies, they can also synthesize themselves to improve your survival ability.

## Gameplay  
Get sunlight
Sunlight will naturally drop during the day, and if you have a sunflower card, you can also collect sunlight through sunflowers.

 Grow plants  
Collect materials, craft plant cards, consume sunlight to plant plants, or replace sunlight consumption with solid sunlight.

 Defend against zombies  
Rely on your plant companions to defeat zombies, collect their drops and money, and survive the dangerous world.

 Card advance  
Craft higher-level cards that have better stat values to make it easier for you to survive.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cbe2eec86a8fe1550335bd66ad07613380efe76.png)

 Look for Dave  
Dave will appear in the world, and if you find him, you can spend money on a wide variety of goods.

## Notice  
In the future, we'll be adding a wave of zombie invasions and allowing you to earn valuable rewards.
